jobs.title: Software Engineer 3 - Frontend
jobs.description: Software Engineer 3 - Frontend eBay Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 21 hours ago Over 200 applicants See who eBay has hired for this role Apply Join or sign in to find your next job Join to apply for the Software Engineer 3 - Frontend role at eBay Email or phone Password Show Forgot password? Sign in Sign in with Email or New to LinkedIn? Join now By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement , Privacy Policy , and Cookie Policy . Save Report this job At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts. Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet. Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all. About The Team We are the Digital Services team within Customer Service Technology under eBay’s Global Technology Organization. We own the end-to-end online customer service experience across web and native mobile, helping millions of buyers and sellers get fast, effective help every day. Our mission is to keep members in-journey and resolve issues through intuitive, compliant self-service experiences, driving high containment and deflection, lower customer effort (CES), and reduced assisted contact. We design and build the experiences that enable customers to quickly find answers, resolve issues through self-service, and get support when needed. . Partnering closely with Product, Design, Data, and Platform teams, we deliver intuitive, reliable, and scalable solutions that improve the end-to-end customer service journey. Our engineers work across frontend applications, backend services, APIs, and platform integrations using a modern, diverse tech stack that includes Java, Node.js, web services, native iOS and Android, and a variety of data stores such as NoSQL and Oracle, with a strong focus on quality, observability, and collaboration in a highly distributed environment. What You'll Do And Learn Translate requirements into software designs and deliver clean, efficient, extensible, and maintainable frontend code. Own and deliver significant features or subsystems within a larger domain across the software lifecycle, including design, development, testing, deployment, observability, and monitoring. Design and build responsive, accessible, and high-performing web experiences using modern frontend technologies and frameworks. Collaborate effectively with Product, Design, Data, and Platform partners to deliver intuitive and reliable customer experiences. Identify areas of the product likely to evolve and help design flexible, reusable solutions that improve maintainability and engineering velocity. Apply strong engineering practices to ensure features are testable, high quality, and continuously deliverable. Break down project features into clear implementation tasks, identify risks and dependencies, and drive execution with minimal supervision. Participate in technical discussions, design reviews, and code reviews, contributing thoughtful input and sound engineering judgment. Support and improve end-to-end testing quality, frontend reliability, and delivery velocity across features. Contribute to debugging, release support, production monitoring, and on-call responsibilities for an always-on 24/7 site. What You Bring Strong sense of ownership and accountability, with solid collaboration and interpersonal skills. Self-driven with a strong ability to learn quickly and adapt to changing priorities. Passion for building intuitive, high-quality user experiences and exploring new technologies within your area of expertise. Commitment to continuous learning through internal and external knowledge-sharing. Interest in developing broad, transferable skills and growing as an engineer. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in EE, CS, or a related field. 4+ years of experience designing and building frontend systems using JavaScript/TypeScript, CSS, React, Node.js, and server-side rendering frameworks. Strong experience integrating frontend applications with REST and/or GraphQL APIs. Strong understanding of web fundamentals, browser behavior, performance optimization, accessibility, and responsive design. Experience with modern frontend architecture patterns, reusable component design, and styling methodologies such as BEM. Experience with build and development tooling such as Webpack, Express.js, and related frontend ecosystem tools. Demonstrated success delivering results in fast-paced environments using Agile, TDD, CI/CD, and modern engineering practices. Ability to build scalable, reliable, and high-performing user-facing applications. Additional Details eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines. jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Software Engineer Workplace Options Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 15 hours ago 151 applicants See who Workplace Options has hired for this role Apply Save Report this job At Workplace Options (WPO), we deliver human-centric solutions that empower people to thrive - personally and professionally. With a global team of more than 4,800 professionals, we provide real-time emotional support, therapy, coaching, mindfulness, and family services to millions worldwide. Since 1982, we’ve partnered with employers, health plans, and insurers to design flexible, forward-thinking programs that evolve alongside today’s changing workforce. Today, we support 160 million people across 150,000 organizations, including over half of Fortune 500 companies. Now part of the TELUS Health family, we are expanding our global impact by combining decades of wellbeing expertise. Together, we’re building healthier, more resilient organizations—one person at a time. WPO is looking forward to take their technology investments to next generation with cutting-edge integration platforms based on Cloud technologies. Selected candidates will have opportunity to work with an exceptionally strong global technology team. Current Position: Software Engineer (.NET - 3+ years) What you will do: We are seeking a Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in .NET to design, build, and maintain scalable, high-performance applications. You will lead technical design, mentor developers, and contribute across the full software development lifecycle. Responsibilities: Translate business requirements into robust .NET solutions. Design and implement backend services using C#, .NET Core/Framework (6/7/8), Web API, Entity Framework, and SQL Server. Participate in architecture discussions, applying SOLID principles and design patterns. Write clean, tested code; conduct reviews and mentor junior engineers. Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, QA, DevOps, Frontend) to deliver end-to-end features. Integrate with databases and external APIs. Drive adoption of CI/CD, cloud deployment (Azure), and microservices. Troubleshoot and optimize applications for performance, scalability, and reliability. Required Skills & Experience: 3+ years of .NET development experience. Expertise in C#, ASP.NET, .NET Core/6/7/8, Web API, Entity Framework, SQL Server. Strong knowledge of RESTful APIs, microservices, and multi-tier design. Familiarity with modern frontends (Angular, React, Blazor). Solid understanding of OOP, design patterns, unit testing, and CI/CD pipelines. Experience with cloud platforms (Azure/AWS/GCP). Strong communication skills and ability to work in Agile teams. Preferred Skills & Experience: Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, message brokers, or event-driven architecture. Knowledge of DevOps tools (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions). Exposure to DDD, CQRS, or domain-driven microservices. Experience mentoring or leading small teams. What we offer: At Workplace Options, we don’t just deliver wellbeing services to our clients, we champion wellbeing for our own employees as well. Examples of our benefits and commitment to employee wellbeing include: Benefits - Group Mediclaim Insurance for 6 lacs INR, Accident Insurance, Gym reimbursement, Tuition reimbursement, EAP Support Services, Mentorship program, WPO Cares, Employee exchange program, Comprehensive training provided for this position At Workplace Options, we are committed to and are accountable for building a workplace where individuals feel empowered to bring their whole selves to work, free from judgment or fear of discrimination. We understand that having a diverse organization is only the beginning and it will require nurturing and care to thrive. We will continue to take action to ensure we achieve equitable and measurable outcomes. We strive to cultivate a space where diverse voices are not only heard but actively sought out and valued for the unique insights they bring. By embracing and promoting authenticity, we aim to build a vibrant and inclusive community that fosters collaboration, innovation, belonging and personal growth. For further details about WPO please check out our website www.workplaceoptions.com and these short videos give a great overview of what we do Human-Powered Care and The WPO Global Experience Workplace Options collects and processes personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws. If you are a European job applicant, refer to our Privacy Notice for further details (https://www.workplaceoptions.com/privacy-notice-for-recruitment/). jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Fullstack
jobs.description: Senior Software Engineer - Fullstack DigiCert Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 19 hours ago 91 applicants See who DigiCert has hired for this role Apply Save Report this job Who we are DigiCert is a global leader in intelligent trust. We protect the digital world by ensuring the security, privacy, and authenticity of every interaction. Our AI-powered DigiCert ONE platform unifies PKI, DNS, and certificate lifecycle management, to secure infrastructure, software, devices, messages, AI content and agents. Learn why more than 100,000 organizations, including 90% of the Fortune 500, choose DigiCert to stop today’s threats and prepare for a quantum-safe future at www.digicert.com Job summary A hands-on software engineer and self-starter with experience working as Full Stack Engineer to develop, build and deploy robust, large scale, quality software in production. What you will do Responsible for full lifecycle of the project from user story to design, development, testing, documentation and maintenance. Develop an understanding and knowledge of products/solutions, architecture and systems. Analyse, troubleshoot and debug product defects and provide timely solutions to customer issues. Review code and help team member to in development of features. Build low latency and high-performance solutions. Work with agile cross-functional team to estimate and plan development activities and timelines. Other duties as assigned. What you will have 5+ years of professional experience working in the software industry. Strong knowledge of Core Java and RUST. Excellent knowledge of Javascript and front end technologies like reactJS. Strong in data structure(s) and algorithms. Good to have - Knowledge of media processing (image/video), metadata systems like JUMBF, EXIF, XMP etc. Strong knowledge of software engineering best-practices in software design and architecture. Good knowledge of Spring, Hibernate Frameworks. Expertise developing and consuming RESTful web services. Passionate in unit testing and producing high quality code Strong knowledge of SQL(s), writing excellent SQL queries. Strong knowledge of writing Web Service APIs Experience using Linux, docker and kubernetes Nice to have Understanding of SSL/TLS, PKI, or other security related technologies. Experience in Cloud platforms like AWS. Benefits Generous time off policies Top shelf benefits Education, wellness and lifestyle support Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering and Information Technology Industries Technology, Information and Internet Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at DigiCert by 2x See who you know
